Author: Marcus Hiemer
Extensions: based on book of Jean Meeus, see citation below
EventComment: d/dt Delta R has zero crossing in Geocentric Coordinates

Rationale.Phenomenon: special planet conjunctions: outer planet maximum distance to Earth
Rationale.NumericalRisk: 1. Sign Transition of Delta R, 2. Angle (planet-sun-earth) is 180°
Validates: Trigonometric edge case sin(180°) or cos(180°)

ScientificPurpose: frequent event every 1-2 years, invisibility of outer planet

ScenarioCitation.Author: Jean Meeus
ScenarioCitation.Citation: Meeus, J. (1998). Astronomical Algorithms (2nd ed.). Richmond, VA: Willmann-Bell, Ex. 36b, p. 252
